prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: treasure chest icon sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source icon sheet with four distinct treasure chest icons.
Subject: 2x2 icon sheet of fantasy chest variants: elemental chest, flame-accent chest, ornate relic chest, reinforced dungeon chest.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D mobile game icon art with clean silhouettes.
Composition/framing: each icon centered with even padding and separation.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta background #FF00FF only.
Color palette: gold, bronze, steel, teal/blue gem accents, warm highlights, but no magenta key color.
Constraints: exact one-color #FF00FF background; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no drop shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no labels; no text; no logos; no watermark; no extra backdrop panel.
Avoid: absolutely no #FF00FF or near-magenta values inside chest icons.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
